# QRAuth.io — Identity Verification Platform

> QRAuth is an identity verification platform with cryptographic challenge-response
> authentication, WebAuthn/passkey support, a device trust registry, real-time fraud
> detection with adaptive scoring, and a full admin control plane. QR codes are one
> authentication transport — not the entire product.

## What QRAuth IS

- An identity verification platform (not "just a QR code tool")
- Same-device? Passkeys. Cross-device? QR scan. Both under one SDK, one identity
- No app install required — users scan with their phone camera, verify in the browser
- A cryptographic challenge-response authentication system
- A developer-first SDK (Node.js, Python) with 10-line integration
- A multi-tenant platform with org isolation, RBAC, and admin dashboards

## Core Capabilities

### Authentication Methods
- QR-based authentication: scan to log in (cross-device, kiosk, smart TV)
- WebAuthn/FIDO2 passkeys: biometric/hardware key sign-in
- Both methods unified under a single identity and session model
- OAuth2 (Google, GitHub, Microsoft, Apple) for dashboard access

### Device Trust Registry
- Automatic device detection and fingerprinting on every login
- Trust levels: NEW, TRUSTED, SUSPICIOUS
- User-facing device management (name, trust, revoke)
- Passkeys linked to specific devices
- Revocation cascades (revoking a device revokes its passkeys)

### Cryptographic Verification
- ECDSA-P256 digital signatures on every QR code
- Challenge-response protocol (not static tokens)
- Content hash verification via deterministic JSON serialization
- Per-organization signing key pairs with rotation and revocation
- Signature: ECDSA_Sign(private_key, SHA256(token + url + geoHash + expiry + contentHash))

### Fraud Detection Engine (6 Signals)
- Duplicate location detection (QR codes within 20m of another org's codes)
- Proxy/VPN detection
- Geographic impossibility (>500km travel in <30min)
- Scan velocity analysis (>50 scans in 5min)
- Bot detection (User-Agent pattern matching)
- Device clustering (same IP scanning 20+ different QR codes in 1hr)

### Adaptive Scoring
- Per-organization signal weights that learn from feedback
- Dynamic rule engine with JSON-based conditions from database
- Real-time feature extraction via Redis (HyperLogLog, rolling averages)
- Trust score 0-100 computed on every verification

### Admin Control Plane
- Multi-tenant dashboard (React 19 + MUI 7)
- KYC review workflow (approve/reject with audit trail)
- Full session audit trail (device, IP, geo, timestamps, scopes)
- Fraud incident management (acknowledge, resolve, notes)
- Analytics with geographic heatmaps, trust score trends
- Audit log (user, action, resource, IP, timestamp)
- Email alerts on HIGH/CRITICAL fraud incidents

### AI Security Agent
- Daily automated security analysis via Claude AI
- 8 tools: query scans, fraud, logins, orgs, features, create rules, write reports
- Creates dynamic fraud rules that go live in <60 seconds
- Anomaly detection comparing 24h data against 7-day baseline

## Technical Architecture
- Monorepo: shared types, API (Fastify 5), web dashboard (React 19), E2E tests
- PostgreSQL 16 + PostGIS for spatial queries
- Redis for caching, feature extraction, rate limiting
- BullMQ for async job processing (scans, fraud, alerts, webhooks)
- Prisma ORM with 15+ models
- 39 E2E tests (API, auth, dashboard, security)

## SDKs
- Node.js SDK: @qrauth/node (v0.1.2) — create, verify, list, delete, bulk ops
- Python SDK: qrauth (v0.1.2) — mirrors Node SDK, context manager support

## Use Cases
1. QR fraud protection — verify physical/digital QR codes are legitimate
2. Passwordless authentication — scan QR or use passkey to log in (like WhatsApp Web)
3. Physical access control — scan to unlock spaces, devices, assets

## Comparison

| Feature | QRAuth | Passkeys Only | Auth0/Clerk | TOTP/2FA |
|---------|--------|---------------|-------------|----------|
| No password needed | Yes | Yes | No | No |
| Cross-device auth | Yes (QR) | Limited | No | No |
| Device trust registry | Yes | No | No | No |
| Fraud detection | 6-signal + AI | No | Basic | No |
| Physical QR verification | Yes | No | No | No |
| WebAuthn support | Yes | Yes | Yes | No |
| Geo-binding | Yes | No | No | No |
| Open protocol | Yes (QRVA) | WebAuthn | No | RFC 6238 |
